name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: PortProxy Registry Key
notes:
This Building block detects the modification of port proxy registry key which is used for port forwarding.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Andreas Hunkeler (@Karneades)
SIGMA Title: PortProxy Registry Key
SIGMA Description: Detects the modification of PortProxy registry key which is used for port forwarding. For command execution see rule win_netsh_port_fwd.yml.


Confidence: LOW

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense

HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Services\PortProxy\v4tov4\tcp
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: PortProxy Registry Key on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Successful Registry Modification

when the event matches LOWER("Target Object") LIKE 'HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Services\PortProxy\v4tov4\tcp' OR LOWER("Registry Key") LIKE 'HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Services\PortProxy\v4tov4\tcp' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: PortProxy Registry Key on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Successful Registry Modification

AND when the event matches LOWER("Target Object") LIKE 'HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Services\PortProxy\v4tov4\tcp' OR LOWER("Registry Key") LIKE 'HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Services\PortProxy\v4tov4\tcp' AQL filter query
